name: Sugar-Ginger Bars
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup C and H Granulated Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together 1 cup sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and ginger in a separate bowl.
4. Stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture, then add buttermilk.
5. Spread batter evenly in a greased 15 x 10-inch pan.
6. Sprinkle remaining sugar over the top of the batter.
7. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into 64 bar cookies (1 x 2 inches).
